review_text: Best caravan park in bundy area

Whether the park was full or not I don't know, the way vans were packed in behind the house was horrid, no order or organisation at all. We were allowed to park between the house ( managers I assume) and the street. Never in my life have I ever parked in someone's front yard and I hope to never have that experience again. There were 3 vans in the front yard that night. Disgustingly unorganised!
Great spot good location friendly staff clean amenities
A lot of permanent residents. It's a nice stay so book early.
This place was better than I ever expected, super happy! Great free kitchen area
Yeah, Na, yeah, it's sorta kinda maybe totally awsome. The bottle O is a very long walk for a bottle of min gin or brewski but yeah. The place rocks
